name: Primary Care
description: General medical care, chronic disease management, and basic preventive services.

name: Dermatology
description: Skin concerns, rashes, acne, lesions, and related evaluations.

name: Mental Health
description: Behavioral health support, counseling resources, and mental health services.

name: Women’s Health
description: Women’s health services and reproductive health-related care.

name: Harm Reduction
description: Low-barrier services focused on safety, risk reduction, and supportive care.

name: Behavioral Health
description: Behavioral health evaluation and support services.

name: Dental
description: Oral health services and dental-related care.

name: Pediatrics
description: Healthcare services for children and adolescents.

name: Preventive Care / Screenings
description: Preventive health services and screenings (e.g., cancer screening programs).

name: LGBTQIA+ Care
description: LGBTQIA+ affirming services and gender-affirming healthcare resources.
